summary: Great audience recording of an intimate, garage‑level show with standout Althea, Minglewood Blues and a thrilling Rhythm Devils > Phil bottleneck > Other One sequence.
review: The tape captures a tight, almost‑garage performance that many reviewers describe as the Dead at their peak – sloppy‑in‑the‑best‑way fun with responsive audience ambience.  Sound quality is praised as clear and enjoyable for an audience source, while highlights such as Althea, Minglewood Blues, Man Smart (Woman Smarter), He's Gone, Spoonful and the Rhythm Devils > Phil bottleneck > Other One solo make it a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer stars (average 4.4) and enthusiastic comments about both performance and sound quality lead to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note clear, great‑sounding audio for an audience tape; the crowd is audible and responsive, adding atmosphere without overwhelming the music.

standout_songs: Rhythm Devils > Phil Bottleneck > The Other One
show_quality.setlist_flow: An intimate, almost‑garage vibe with a loose yet inspired feel; the show flows from tight jams into a thrilling drum/solo segment that keeps the tiny audience highly engaged.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for an inspiring bottleneck solo and central role in the Rhythm Devils > Phil Bottleneck > Other One sequence.
band_member_comments.Drums: The Rhythm Devils segment showcases strong drum interplay, adding energy and excitement to the performance.
